subtitle.en: How house strength is computed from the lord's Shadbala, directional dignity, and aspects received  –  revealing which life areas flourish naturally and which require effort
subtitle.hi: भाव स्वामी के षड्बल, दिशात्मक गरिमा और प्राप्त दृष्टियों से भाव शक्ति की गणना  –  कौन-से जीवन क्षेत्र स्वाभाविक रूप से फलते हैं और किनमें प्रयास आवश्यक है
subtitle.ta: வீட்டு அதிபதியின் ஷட்பலம், திசை கௌரவம் மற்றும் பெறப்பட்ட திருஷ்டிகளிலிருந்து வீட்டு பலம் கணக்கிடுதல்
subtitle.te: భావ స్వామి షడ్బలం, దిశాత్మక గౌరవం మరియు పొందిన దృష్టుల నుండి భావ బలం గణన
subtitle.bn: ভাব স্বামীর ষড়বল, দিশাত্মক মর্যাদা এবং প্রাপ্ত দৃষ্টি থেকে ভাব বল গণনা
subtitle.kn: ಭಾವ ಸ್ವಾಮಿಯ ಷಡ್ಬಲ, ದಿಶಾತ್ಮಕ ಗೌರವ ಮತ್ತು ಪಡೆದ ದೃಷ್ಟಿಗಳಿಂದ ಭಾವ ಬಲ ಲೆಕ್ಕಾಚಾರ
subtitle.mr: भाव स्वामीचे षड्बल, दिशात्मक प्रतिष्ठा आणि प्राप्त दृष्टींवरून भाव बल गणना
subtitle.gu: ભાવ સ્વામીનું ષડ્બળ, દિશાત્મક ગૌરવ અને પ્રાપ્ત દ્રષ્ટિઓથી ભાવ બળ ગણતરી
subtitle.mai: भाव स्वामीक षड्बल, दिशात्मक गरिमा आ प्राप्त दृष्टि सँ भाव बल गणना

question.en: What are the three components of Bhavabala?
question.hi: भावबल के तीन घटक क्या हैं?
question.ta: What are the three components of Bhavabala?
question.te: What are the three components of Bhavabala?
question.bn: What are the three components of Bhavabala?
question.kn: What are the three components of Bhavabala?
question.mr: भावबल के तीन घटक क्या हैं?
question.gu: What are the three components of Bhavabala?
question.mai: Bhavabala क तीन घटक की अछि?

explanation.en: Bhavabala consists of three components: Bhavadhipati Bala (strength contributed by the house lord's Shadbala), Bhava Dig Bala (inherent directional strength of the house), and Bhava Drishti Bala (net strength from planetary aspects received by the house).
explanation.hi: भावबल के तीन घटक हैं: भावाधिपति बल (भाव स्वामी के षड्बल से प्राप्त शक्ति), भाव दिग्बल (भाव की अन्तर्निहित दिशात्मक शक्ति), और भाव दृष्टि बल (भाव को प्राप्त ग्रह दृष्टियों से शुद्ध शक्ति)।
explanation.ta: Bhavabala consists of three components: Bhavadhipati Bala (strength contributed by the house lord's Shadbala), Bhava Dig Bala (inherent directional strength of the house), and Bhava Drishti Bala (net strength from planetary aspects received by the house).
explanation.te: Bhavabala consists of three components: Bhavadhipati Bala (strength contributed by the house lord's Shadbala), Bhava Dig Bala (inherent directional strength of the house), and Bhava Drishti Bala (net strength from planetary aspects received by the house).
explanation.bn: Bhavabala consists of three components: Bhavadhipati Bala (strength contributed by the house lord's Shadbala), Bhava Dig Bala (inherent directional strength of the house), and Bhava Drishti Bala (net strength from planetary aspects received by the house).
explanation.kn: Bhavabala consists of three components: Bhavadhipati Bala (strength contributed by the house lord's Shadbala), Bhava Dig Bala (inherent directional strength of the house), and Bhava Drishti Bala (net strength from planetary aspects received by the house).
explanation.mr: भावबल के तीन घटक हैं: भावाधिपति बल (भाव स्वामी के षड्बल से प्राप्त शक्ति), भाव दिग्बल (भाव की अन्तर्निहित दिशात्मक शक्ति), और भाव दृष्टि बल (भाव को प्राप्त ग्रह दृष्टियों से शुद्ध शक्ति)।
explanation.gu: Bhavabala consists of three components: Bhavadhipati Bala (strength contributed by the house lord's Shadbala), Bhava Dig Bala (inherent directional strength of the house), and Bhava Drishti Bala (net strength from planetary aspects received by the house).
explanation.mai: Bhavabala तीन घटक सँ बनल अछि: Bhavadhipati Bala (भाव स्वामीक Shadbala द्वारा देल गेल बल), Bhava Dig Bala (भावक स्वाभाविक दिशात्मक बल), आ Bhava Drishti Bala (भाव पर प्राप्त ग्रहक दृष्टि सँ शुद्ध बल)।

options.en: Bhavadhipati Bala, Bhava Dig Bala, Bhava Drishti Bala

options.mai: Bhavadhipati Bala, Bhava Dig Bala, Bhava Drishti Bala

question.en: A house with a weak lord but strong benefic aspects can still function well according to Bhavabala.
question.hi: भावबल के अनुसार दुर्बल स्वामी पर प्रबल शुभ दृष्टि वाला भाव भी अच्छा कार्य कर सकता है।
question.ta: A house with a weak lord but strong benefic aspects can still function well according to Bhavabala.
question.te: A house with a weak lord but strong benefic aspects can still function well according to Bhavabala.
question.bn: A house with a weak lord but strong benefic aspects can still function well according to Bhavabala.
question.kn: A house with a weak lord but strong benefic aspects can still function well according to Bhavabala.
question.mr: भावबल के अनुसार दुर्बल स्वामी पर प्रबल शुभ दृष्टि वाला भाव भी अच्छा कार्य कर सकता है।
question.gu: A house with a weak lord but strong benefic aspects can still function well according to Bhavabala.
question.mai: कमजोर स्वामीक संग मुदा मजबूत शुभ दृष्टि वला एकटा भाव Bhavabala क अनुसार तइयो नीक काज कऽ सकैत अछि।

explanation.en: True. Bhavabala is a composite score. If Bhavadhipati Bala is low (weak lord) but Bhava Drishti Bala is high (Jupiter's full aspect on the house, for example), the total Bhavabala can still be adequate. The three components compensate for each other.
explanation.hi: सत्य। भावबल एक समग्र अंक है। यदि भावाधिपति बल कम है (दुर्बल स्वामी) पर भाव दृष्टि बल उच्च है (जैसे बृहस्पति की पूर्ण दृष्टि), तो कुल भावबल पर्याप्त हो सकता है। तीनों घटक एक-दूसरे की क्षतिपूर्ति करते हैं।
explanation.ta: True. Bhavabala is a composite score. If Bhavadhipati Bala is low (weak lord) but Bhava Drishti Bala is high (Jupiter's full aspect on the house, for example), the total Bhavabala can still be adequate. The three components compensate for each other.
explanation.te: True. Bhavabala is a composite score. If Bhavadhipati Bala is low (weak lord) but Bhava Drishti Bala is high (Jupiter's full aspect on the house, for example), the total Bhavabala can still be adequate. The three components compensate for each other.
explanation.bn: True. Bhavabala is a composite score. If Bhavadhipati Bala is low (weak lord) but Bhava Drishti Bala is high (Jupiter's full aspect on the house, for example), the total Bhavabala can still be adequate. The three components compensate for each other.
explanation.kn: True. Bhavabala is a composite score. If Bhavadhipati Bala is low (weak lord) but Bhava Drishti Bala is high (Jupiter's full aspect on the house, for example), the total Bhavabala can still be adequate. The three components compensate for each other.
explanation.mr: सत्य। भावबल एक समग्र अंक है। यदि भावाधिपति बल कम है (दुर्बल स्वामी) पर भाव दृष्टि बल उच्च है (जैसे बृहस्पति की पूर्ण दृष्टि), तो कुल भावबल पर्याप्त हो सकता है। तीनों घटक एक-दूसरे की क्षतिपूर्ति करते हैं।
explanation.gu: True. Bhavabala is a composite score. If Bhavadhipati Bala is low (weak lord) but Bhava Drishti Bala is high (Jupiter's full aspect on the house, for example), the total Bhavabala can still be adequate. The three components compensate for each other.
explanation.mai: सत्य। Bhavabala एकटा मिश्रित अंक अछि। जँ Bhavadhipati Bala कम अछि (कमजोर स्वामी) मुदा Bhava Drishti Bala बेसी अछि (उदाहरणक लेल, भाव पर गुरु क पूर्ण दृष्टि), तँ कुल Bhavabala तइयो पर्याप्त भऽ सकैत अछि। तीनू घटक एक दोसरक कमी पूरा करैत अछि।

question.en: In Bhava Dig Bala, which houses are considered inherently strongest?
question.hi: भाव दिग्बल में कौन-से भाव अन्तर्निहित रूप से सबसे बलवान माने जाते हैं?
question.ta: In Bhava Dig Bala, which houses are considered inherently strongest?
question.te: In Bhava Dig Bala, which houses are considered inherently strongest?
question.bn: In Bhava Dig Bala, which houses are considered inherently strongest?
question.kn: In Bhava Dig Bala, which houses are considered inherently strongest?
question.mr: भाव दिग्बल में कौन-से भाव अन्तर्निहित रूप से सबसे बलवान माने जाते हैं?
question.gu: In Bhava Dig Bala, which houses are considered inherently strongest?
question.mai: Bhava Dig Bala मे, कोन भाव स्वाभाविक रूप सँ सभसँ मजबूत मानल जाइत अछि?

explanation.en: The 1st and 7th houses (the primary kendra axis) carry the highest inherent Bhava Dig Bala. The logic mirrors Dig Bala for planets: angular houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) are inherently powerful, with the 1st/7th axis being strongest.
explanation.hi: प्रथम और सप्तम भाव (प्राथमिक केन्द्र अक्ष) सर्वाधिक अन्तर्निहित भाव दिग्बल रखते हैं। तर्क ग्रहों के दिग्बल जैसा है: केन्द्र भाव (1, 4, 7, 10) अन्तर्निहित रूप से शक्तिशाली हैं, 1/7 अक्ष सबसे बलवान।
explanation.ta: The 1st and 7th houses (the primary kendra axis) carry the highest inherent Bhava Dig Bala. The logic mirrors Dig Bala for planets: angular houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) are inherently powerful, with the 1st/7th axis being strongest.
explanation.te: The 1st and 7th houses (the primary kendra axis) carry the highest inherent Bhava Dig Bala. The logic mirrors Dig Bala for planets: angular houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) are inherently powerful, with the 1st/7th axis being strongest.
explanation.bn: The 1st and 7th houses (the primary kendra axis) carry the highest inherent Bhava Dig Bala. The logic mirrors Dig Bala for planets: angular houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) are inherently powerful, with the 1st/7th axis being strongest.
explanation.kn: The 1st and 7th houses (the primary kendra axis) carry the highest inherent Bhava Dig Bala. The logic mirrors Dig Bala for planets: angular houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) are inherently powerful, with the 1st/7th axis being strongest.
explanation.mr: प्रथम और सप्तम भाव (प्राथमिक केन्द्र अक्ष) सर्वाधिक अन्तर्निहित भाव दिग्बल रखते हैं। तर्क ग्रहों के दिग्बल जैसा है: केन्द्र भाव (1, 4, 7, 10) अन्तर्निहित रूप से शक्तिशाली हैं, 1/7 अक्ष सबसे बलवान।
explanation.gu: The 1st and 7th houses (the primary kendra axis) carry the highest inherent Bhava Dig Bala. The logic mirrors Dig Bala for planets: angular houses (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) are inherently powerful, with the 1st/7th axis being strongest.
explanation.mai: पहिल आ सातम् भाव (मुख्य केन्द्र अक्ष) सभसँ बेसी स्वाभाविक Bhava Dig Bala रखैत अछि। ई तर्क ग्रहक लेल Dig Bala क समान अछि: कोणीय भाव (पहिल, चारिम, सातम्, दसम्) स्वाभाविक रूप सँ शक्तिशाली होइत अछि, जतय पहिल/सातम् अक्ष सभसँ मजबूत होइत अछि।

question.hi: भावाधिपति बल की गणना कैसे की जाती है?
question.mr: भावाधिपति बल की गणना कैसे की जाती है?
question.mai: Bhavadhipati Bala क गणना कोना कएल जाइत अछि?

explanation.en: Bhavadhipati Bala is derived from the house lord's total Shadbala score, scaled by a proportionality factor. A strong lord (high Shadbala) directly strengthens the house it rules. This is why Shadbala must be computed first before Bhavabala.
explanation.hi: भावाधिपति बल भाव स्वामी के कुल षड्बल अंक से प्राप्त होता है, आनुपातिकता गुणक द्वारा मापित। बलवान स्वामी (उच्च षड्बल) सीधे उस भाव को बलवान बनाता है जिसका वह स्वामी है। इसीलिए भावबल से पहले षड्बल की गणना आवश्यक है।
explanation.ta: Bhavadhipati Bala is derived from the house lord's total Shadbala score, scaled by a proportionality factor. A strong lord (high Shadbala) directly strengthens the house it rules. This is why Shadbala must be computed first before Bhavabala.
explanation.te: Bhavadhipati Bala is derived from the house lord's total Shadbala score, scaled by a proportionality factor. A strong lord (high Shadbala) directly strengthens the house it rules. This is why Shadbala must be computed first before Bhavabala.
explanation.bn: Bhavadhipati Bala is derived from the house lord's total Shadbala score, scaled by a proportionality factor. A strong lord (high Shadbala) directly strengthens the house it rules. This is why Shadbala must be computed first before Bhavabala.
explanation.kn: Bhavadhipati Bala is derived from the house lord's total Shadbala score, scaled by a proportionality factor. A strong lord (high Shadbala) directly strengthens the house it rules. This is why Shadbala must be computed first before Bhavabala.
explanation.mr: भावाधिपति बल भाव स्वामी के कुल षड्बल अंक से प्राप्त होता है, आनुपातिकता गुणक द्वारा मापित। बलवान स्वामी (उच्च षड्बल) सीधे उस भाव को बलवान बनाता है जिसका वह स्वामी है। इसीलिए भावबल से पहले षड्बल की गणना आवश्यक है।
explanation.gu: Bhavadhipati Bala is derived from the house lord's total Shadbala score, scaled by a proportionality factor. A strong lord (high Shadbala) directly strengthens the house it rules. This is why Shadbala must be computed first before Bhavabala.
explanation.mai: Bhavadhipati Bala भाव स्वामीक कुल Shadbala अंक सँ प्राप्त होइत अछि, जे एकटा आनुपातिक कारक द्वारा मापल जाइत अछि। एकटा मजबूत स्वामी (बेसी Shadbala) ओ भाव केँ सीधा मजबूत करैत अछि जकर ओ शासन करैत अछि। एही कारण सँ Bhavabala सँ पहिने Shadbala क गणना कएल जेना चाही।

question.en: Jupiter's full aspect on a house adds approximately 60 shashtiamsas to Bhava Drishti Bala.
question.hi: भाव पर बृहस्पति की पूर्ण दृष्टि भाव दृष्टि बल में लगभग 60 षष्ट्यंश जोड़ती है।
question.ta: Jupiter's full aspect on a house adds approximately 60 shashtiamsas to Bhava Drishti Bala.
question.te: Jupiter's full aspect on a house adds approximately 60 shashtiamsas to Bhava Drishti Bala.
question.bn: Jupiter's full aspect on a house adds approximately 60 shashtiamsas to Bhava Drishti Bala.
question.kn: Jupiter's full aspect on a house adds approximately 60 shashtiamsas to Bhava Drishti Bala.
question.mr: भाव पर बृहस्पति की पूर्ण दृष्टि भाव दृष्टि बल में लगभग 60 षष्ट्यंश जोड़ती है।
question.gu: Jupiter's full aspect on a house adds approximately 60 shashtiamsas to Bhava Drishti Bala.
question.mai: एकटा भाव पर गुरु क पूर्ण दृष्टि Bhava Drishti Bala मे लगभग ६० shashtiamsas जोड़ैत अछि।

explanation.en: True. Jupiter is the greatest benefic, and its full aspect (5th, 7th, or 9th from its position) contributes approximately +60 shashtiamsas to the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Jupiter's aspect is considered the most protective influence on any house.
explanation.hi: सत्य। बृहस्पति सबसे बड़ा शुभ ग्रह है, और इसकी पूर्ण दृष्टि (अपनी स्थिति से 5वीं, 7वीं या 9वीं) भाव के दृष्टि बल में लगभग +60 षष्ट्यंश योगदान करती है। इसीलिए बृहस्पति की दृष्टि किसी भी भाव पर सबसे रक्षात्मक प्रभाव मानी जाती है।
explanation.ta: True. Jupiter is the greatest benefic, and its full aspect (5th, 7th, or 9th from its position) contributes approximately +60 shashtiamsas to the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Jupiter's aspect is considered the most protective influence on any house.
explanation.te: True. Jupiter is the greatest benefic, and its full aspect (5th, 7th, or 9th from its position) contributes approximately +60 shashtiamsas to the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Jupiter's aspect is considered the most protective influence on any house.
explanation.bn: True. Jupiter is the greatest benefic, and its full aspect (5th, 7th, or 9th from its position) contributes approximately +60 shashtiamsas to the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Jupiter's aspect is considered the most protective influence on any house.
explanation.kn: True. Jupiter is the greatest benefic, and its full aspect (5th, 7th, or 9th from its position) contributes approximately +60 shashtiamsas to the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Jupiter's aspect is considered the most protective influence on any house.
explanation.mr: सत्य। बृहस्पति सबसे बड़ा शुभ ग्रह है, और इसकी पूर्ण दृष्टि (अपनी स्थिति से 5वीं, 7वीं या 9वीं) भाव के दृष्टि बल में लगभग +60 षष्ट्यंश योगदान करती है। इसीलिए बृहस्पति की दृष्टि किसी भी भाव पर सबसे रक्षात्मक प्रभाव मानी जाती है।
explanation.gu: True. Jupiter is the greatest benefic, and its full aspect (5th, 7th, or 9th from its position) contributes approximately +60 shashtiamsas to the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Jupiter's aspect is considered the most protective influence on any house.
explanation.mai: सत्य। गुरु सभसँ पैघ शुभ ग्रह अछि, आ एकर पूर्ण दृष्टि (अपन स्थिति सँ ५म, ७म, वा ९म) भावक Drishti Bala मे लगभग +६० shashtiamsas क योगदान करैत अछि। एही कारण सँ गुरु क दृष्टि केँ कोनो भाव पर सभसँ बेसी सुरक्षात्मक प्रभाव मानल जाइत अछि।

question.mr: कुण्डली में सबसे बलवान भाव इंगित करता है:
question.gu: The strongest Bhava in a chart indicates:
question.mai: एकटा कुण्डली मे सभसँ मजबूत भाव इंगित करैत अछि:

explanation.en: The house with the highest Bhavabala represents the life area where the native experiences the greatest natural success and least resistance. A strong 10th house = easy career progress; a strong 7th house = natural relationship harmony.
explanation.hi: सर्वाधिक भावबल वाला भाव उस जीवन क्षेत्र को दर्शाता है जहाँ जातक सबसे अधिक स्वाभाविक सफलता और न्यूनतम प्रतिरोध अनुभव करता है। बलवान दशम भाव = सहज करियर प्रगति; बलवान सप्तम भाव = स्वाभाविक सम्बन्ध सामंजस्य।
explanation.ta: The house with the highest Bhavabala represents the life area where the native experiences the greatest natural success and least resistance. A strong 10th house = easy career progress; a strong 7th house = natural relationship harmony.
explanation.te: The house with the highest Bhavabala represents the life area where the native experiences the greatest natural success and least resistance. A strong 10th house = easy career progress; a strong 7th house = natural relationship harmony.
explanation.bn: The house with the highest Bhavabala represents the life area where the native experiences the greatest natural success and least resistance. A strong 10th house = easy career progress; a strong 7th house = natural relationship harmony.
explanation.kn: The house with the highest Bhavabala represents the life area where the native experiences the greatest natural success and least resistance. A strong 10th house = easy career progress; a strong 7th house = natural relationship harmony.
explanation.mr: सर्वाधिक भावबल वाला भाव उस जीवन क्षेत्र को दर्शाता है जहाँ जातक सबसे अधिक स्वाभाविक सफलता और न्यूनतम प्रतिरोध अनुभव करता है। बलवान दशम भाव = सहज करियर प्रगति; बलवान सप्तम भाव = स्वाभाविक सम्बन्ध सामंजस्य।
explanation.gu: The house with the highest Bhavabala represents the life area where the native experiences the greatest natural success and least resistance. A strong 10th house = easy career progress; a strong 7th house = natural relationship harmony.
explanation.mai: सभसँ बेसी Bhavabala वला भाव जीवनक ओ क्षेत्र केँ दर्शाबैत अछि जतय जातक सभसँ बेसी स्वाभाविक सफलता आ सभसँ कम प्रतिरोधक अनुभव करैत अछि। एकटा मजबूत दसम् भाव = आसान करियर प्रगति; एकटा मजबूत सातम् भाव = स्वाभाविक सम्बन्ध सद्भाव।

question.te: Saturn's full aspect on a house affects Bhava Drishti Bala by:

question.gu: Saturn's full aspect on a house affects Bhava Drishti Bala by:
question.mai: एकटा भाव पर शनि क पूर्ण दृष्टि Bhava Drishti Bala केँ एहि प्रकार प्रभावित करैत अछि:

explanation.en: Saturn is a natural malefic, so its full aspect subtracts approximately 60 shashtiamsas from the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Saturn's aspect on the 7th house is associated with delays in marriage, and on the 5th house with challenges in children.
explanation.hi: शनि प्राकृतिक पापी ग्रह है, अतः इसकी पूर्ण दृष्टि भाव के दृष्टि बल से लगभग 60 षष्ट्यंश घटाती है। इसीलिए सप्तम भाव पर शनि की दृष्टि विवाह में विलम्ब से और पंचम पर सन्तान में चुनौतियों से जुड़ी है।

explanation.gu: Saturn is a natural malefic, so its full aspect subtracts approximately 60 shashtiamsas from the house's Drishti Bala. This is why Saturn's aspect on the 7th house is associated with delays in marriage, and on the 5th house with challenges in children.
explanation.mai: शनि एकटा स्वाभाविक अशुभ ग्रह अछि, तें एकर पूर्ण दृष्टि भावक Drishti Bala सँ लगभग ६० shashtiamsas घटाबैत अछि। एही कारण सँ सातम् भाव पर शनि क दृष्टि विवाह मे देरी सँ जुड़ल अछि, आ पाँचम् भाव पर संतान मे चुनौती सँ।

question.en: Two charts with the same lagna will always have identical Bhavabala distributions.
question.hi: एक ही लग्न वाली दो कुण्डलियों में सदैव समान भावबल वितरण होगा।
question.ta: Two charts with the same lagna will always have identical Bhavabala distributions.
question.te: Two charts with the same lagna will always have identical Bhavabala distributions.
question.bn: Two charts with the same lagna will always have identical Bhavabala distributions.
question.kn: Two charts with the same lagna will always have identical Bhavabala distributions.
question.mr: एक ही लग्न वाली दो कुण्डलियों में सदैव समान भावबल वितरण होगा।
question.gu: Two charts with the same lagna will always have identical Bhavabala distributions.
question.mai: समान लग्नक संग दू कुण्डली हमेशा समान Bhavabala वितरण रखत।

explanation.en: False. Even with the same lagna, different planetary positions mean different Shadbala for each lord (affecting Bhavadhipati Bala) and different aspects on each house (affecting Drishti Bala). Same lagna, vastly different Bhavabala patterns, creating completely different life experiences.
explanation.hi: असत्य। एक ही लग्न होने पर भी, भिन्न ग्रह स्थितियाँ प्रत्येक स्वामी के लिए भिन्न षड्बल (भावाधिपति बल प्रभावित) और प्रत्येक भाव पर भिन्न दृष्टियाँ (दृष्टि बल प्रभावित) देती हैं। एक ही लग्न, अत्यन्त भिन्न भावबल प्रतिरूप, पूर्णतया भिन्न जीवन अनुभव।
explanation.ta: False. Even with the same lagna, different planetary positions mean different Shadbala for each lord (affecting Bhavadhipati Bala) and different aspects on each house (affecting Drishti Bala). Same lagna, vastly different Bhavabala patterns, creating completely different life experiences.
explanation.te: False. Even with the same lagna, different planetary positions mean different Shadbala for each lord (affecting Bhavadhipati Bala) and different aspects on each house (affecting Drishti Bala). Same lagna, vastly different Bhavabala patterns, creating completely different life experiences.
explanation.bn: False. Even with the same lagna, different planetary positions mean different Shadbala for each lord (affecting Bhavadhipati Bala) and different aspects on each house (affecting Drishti Bala). Same lagna, vastly different Bhavabala patterns, creating completely different life experiences.

explanation.gu: False. Even with the same lagna, different planetary positions mean different Shadbala for each lord (affecting Bhavadhipati Bala) and different aspects on each house (affecting Drishti Bala). Same lagna, vastly different Bhavabala patterns, creating completely different life experiences.
explanation.mai: असत्य। समान लग्नक संग सेहो, भिन्न ग्रहक स्थिति क अर्थ अछि प्रत्येक स्वामीक लेल भिन्न Shadbala (Bhavadhipati Bala केँ प्रभावित करैत) आ प्रत्येक भाव पर भिन्न दृष्टि (Drishti Bala केँ प्रभावित करैत)। समान लग्न, बहुत भिन्न Bhavabala पैटर्न, जे पूर्ण रूप सँ भिन्न जीवन अनुभव उत्पन्न करैत अछि।

question.en: For analyzing marriage prospects, which house's Bhavabala is most relevant?
question.hi: विवाह सम्भावनाओं के विश्लेषण के लिए किस भाव का भावबल सबसे प्रासंगिक है?
question.ta: For analyzing marriage prospects, which house's Bhavabala is most relevant?
question.te: For analyzing marriage prospects, which house's Bhavabala is most relevant?
question.bn: For analyzing marriage prospects, which house's Bhavabala is most relevant?
question.kn: For analyzing marriage prospects, which house's Bhavabala is most relevant?
question.mr: विवाह सम्भावनाओं के विश्लेषण के लिए किस भाव का भावबल सबसे प्रासंगिक है?
question.gu: For analyzing marriage prospects, which house's Bhavabala is most relevant?
question.mai: विवाहक संभावनाक विश्लेषणक लेल, कोन भावक Bhavabala सभसँ बेसी प्रासंगिक अछि?

explanation.en: The 7th house governs marriage and partnerships. Its Bhavabala reveals whether marriage comes easily (high strength) or with delay and challenges (low strength). The 7th lord's Shadbala, benefic aspects on the 7th, and the 7th house Dig Bala all contribute.
explanation.hi: सप्तम भाव विवाह और साझेदारी का शासक है। इसका भावबल दर्शाता है कि विवाह सहज होगा (उच्च शक्ति) या विलम्ब और चुनौतियों सहित (कम शक्ति)। सप्तमेश का षड्बल, सप्तम पर शुभ दृष्टि, और सप्तम भाव दिग्बल सभी योगदान करते हैं।
explanation.ta: The 7th house governs marriage and partnerships. Its Bhavabala reveals whether marriage comes easily (high strength) or with delay and challenges (low strength). The 7th lord's Shadbala, benefic aspects on the 7th, and the 7th house Dig Bala all contribute.
explanation.te: The 7th house governs marriage and partnerships. Its Bhavabala reveals whether marriage comes easily (high strength) or with delay and challenges (low strength). The 7th lord's Shadbala, benefic aspects on the 7th, and the 7th house Dig Bala all contribute.
explanation.bn: The 7th house governs marriage and partnerships. Its Bhavabala reveals whether marriage comes easily (high strength) or with delay and challenges (low strength). The 7th lord's Shadbala, benefic aspects on the 7th, and the 7th house Dig Bala all contribute.
explanation.kn: The 7th house governs marriage and partnerships. Its Bhavabala reveals whether marriage comes easily (high strength) or with delay and challenges (low strength). The 7th lord's Shadbala, benefic aspects on the 7th, and the 7th house Dig Bala all contribute.
explanation.mr: सप्तम भाव विवाह और साझेदारी का शासक है। इसका भावबल दर्शाता है कि विवाह सहज होगा (उच्च शक्ति) या विलम्ब और चुनौतियों सहित (कम शक्ति)। सप्तमेश का षड्बल, सप्तम पर शुभ दृष्टि, और सप्तम भाव दिग्बल सभी योगदान करते हैं।
explanation.gu: The 7th house governs marriage and partnerships. Its Bhavabala reveals whether marriage comes easily (high strength) or with delay and challenges (low strength). The 7th lord's Shadbala, benefic aspects on the 7th, and the 7th house Dig Bala all contribute.
explanation.mai: सातम् भाव विवाह आ साझेदारी पर शासन करैत अछि। एकर Bhavabala ई बताबैत अछि जे विवाह आसानी सँ (बेसी बल) होइत अछि वा देरी आ चुनौती (कम बल) क संग। सातम् स्वामीक Shadbala, सातम् पर शुभ दृष्टि, आ सातम् भावक Dig Bala सभ योगदान करैत अछि।

question.gu: How does Bhavabala help prioritize dasha predictions?
question.mai: Bhavabala दशा भविष्यवाणी केँ प्राथमिकता देबय मे कोना मदद करैत अछि?

explanation.en: During the dasha of a house lord, that house's significations become active. A house with high Bhavabala will manifest its themes positively and prominently during its lord's dasha. Low Bhavabala houses produce muted or challenging results even in favorable dashas.
explanation.hi: भाव स्वामी की दशा में उस भाव के कारकत्व सक्रिय होते हैं। उच्च भावबल वाला भाव अपने स्वामी की दशा में सकारात्मक और प्रमुख रूप से प्रकट होता है। कम भावबल वाले भाव अनुकूल दशाओं में भी मन्द या चुनौतीपूर्ण परिणाम देते हैं।
explanation.ta: During the dasha of a house lord, that house's significations become active. A house with high Bhavabala will manifest its themes positively and prominently during its lord's dasha. Low Bhavabala houses produce muted or challenging results even in favorable dashas.
explanation.te: During the dasha of a house lord, that house's significations become active. A house with high Bhavabala will manifest its themes positively and prominently during its lord's dasha. Low Bhavabala houses produce muted or challenging results even in favorable dashas.
explanation.bn: During the dasha of a house lord, that house's significations become active. A house with high Bhavabala will manifest its themes positively and prominently during its lord's dasha. Low Bhavabala houses produce muted or challenging results even in favorable dashas.
explanation.kn: During the dasha of a house lord, that house's significations become active. A house with high Bhavabala will manifest its themes positively and prominently during its lord's dasha. Low Bhavabala houses produce muted or challenging results even in favorable dashas.
explanation.mr: भाव स्वामी की दशा में उस भाव के कारकत्व सक्रिय होते हैं। उच्च भावबल वाला भाव अपने स्वामी की दशा में सकारात्मक और प्रमुख रूप से प्रकट होता है। कम भावबल वाले भाव अनुकूल दशाओं में भी मन्द या चुनौतीपूर्ण परिणाम देते हैं।
explanation.gu: During the dasha of a house lord, that house's significations become active. A house with high Bhavabala will manifest its themes positively and prominently during its lord's dasha. Low Bhavabala houses produce muted or challenging results even in favorable dashas.
explanation.mai: एकटा भाव स्वामीक दशाक समय मे, ओ भावक कारकत्व सक्रिय भऽ जाइत अछि। बेसी Bhavabala वला भाव अपन स्वामीक दशाक समय मे अपन विषय-वस्तु केँ सकारात्मक आ प्रमुख रूप सँ प्रकट करत। कम Bhavabala वला भाव अनुकूल दशामे सेहो मंद वा चुनौतीपूर्ण परिणाम उत्पन्न करैत अछि।

options.hi: यह दशा विश्लेषण को पूरी तरह प्रतिस्थापित करता है
options.mr: यह दशा विश्लेषण को पूरी तरह प्रतिस्थापित करता है
options.mai: ई पूर्ण रूप सँ दशा विश्लेषण केँ बदल दैत अछि

options.en: Stronger houses manifest their significations more prominently during relevant dashas
